title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used by the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize driver and team thinking patterns during races. The system analyzed biometric and performance data to generate visual representations displayed on helmets, race suits, and in the garage.
